title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Craftsvilla

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Craftsvilla
jsonLd.description:
Craftsvilla invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Category Manager at our Varanasi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Craftsvilla:
Craftsvilla is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Craftsvilla!
